prompt: A high-end editorial fashion photograph shown as an open large-format hardcover magazine or art book lying flat on a clean off-white surface, viewed from directly above. The two-page spread contains 2 full-page portraits of the same elegant woman with her face obscured by a soft square blur, creating a privacy-censored look. On the left page, she stands against a pale stone or concrete architectural wall wearing a structured long-sleeve dress in {argument name="dress color" default="soft slate gray"}, with a fitted bodice, round neckline, sharply tailored seams, and an exaggerated sculptural bell-shaped skirt; the camera angle is slightly low, making her neck appear long and her posture statuesque. On the right page, she is photographed from the back in a dramatic {argument name="second dress color" default="black"} evening gown with a very deep open back, wide shoulder straps, and a voluminous full skirt, standing in front of a classic paneled wall or door in a dim, moody interior. Use luxury fashion magazine styling, minimal composition, muted tones, soft natural-looking light, refined shadows, realistic paper texture, visible book gutter, slightly curved pages, and crisp print detail. The overall mood is sophisticated, couture, cinematic, and understated, like a premium fashion editorial spread.
translatedPrompt: 一张高端时尚编辑摄影作品，展示了一本打开的大幅面精装杂志或艺术书籍，平放在干净的灰白色表面上，采用正上方俯视视角。双页内页包含 2 张同一位优雅女性的全页肖像，她的面部被柔和的方形模糊处理，营造出一种隐私遮蔽的视觉感。左页中，她站在浅色石材或混凝土建筑墙前，身穿一件 {argument name="dress color" default="柔和板岩灰"} 的结构感长袖连衣裙，配有合身紧身胸衣、圆领、剪裁利落的接缝以及夸张的雕塑感钟形裙摆；拍摄角度略低，使她的颈部显得修长，姿态如雕塑般优雅。右页中，她身穿一件戏剧性的 {argument name="second dress color" default="黑色"} 露背晚礼服，背部大面积镂空，配有宽肩带和蓬松的宽大裙摆，站在昏暗、情绪化的室内，背景是一面经典的镶板墙或门。采用奢华时尚杂志风格、极简构图、柔和色调、自然光感、精致阴影、逼真的纸张纹理、清晰可见的书脊装订线、略微弯曲的页面以及清晰的印刷细节。整体氛围高级、具有高定感、电影质感且低调，宛如顶级时尚杂志的内页。

breakdown.creativeCore: 奢华时尚书籍内页：此提示词可生成一张逼真的俯视照片，展示一本打开的时尚书籍，呈现双页高级定制时装内页，非常适合奢华品牌推广、杂志样机或风格化广告视觉效果。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 杂志封面、专题页、品牌刊物、人物专访视觉

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, cinematic, editorial, luxury, premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: camera]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
